first of all: i had joined the game like normal then when i joined i started using mods ill admit i was flying but there were 5 other people flying AND they were also taggers. Then 2 people start telling me that “you’re mom died” or “you have no dad” and they claim there was a mod in there undercover and he didn’t do nothing about it and no one knew it was a mod. then i get back on my vr go into a lobby and playing normally and to my surprise i was playing with a mod then showed me the stick and went to my username to ban  and claims i was being “toxic” but i didnt even do or say anything that could’ve harmed or hurt anyone. then other people started joining and the mod calls the owner and more other mods and the mod said i was flying around making it hard for people to tag me but i was the tagger and i was only flying to get someone who was flying and wasnt tagged. then the mod tells the owner to check the video that he sent to them and its of me being toxic but i was trying to defend myself from people who were being sexist and threatening me which makes no sense how i got banned but they didn’t and everyone started reporting me and i got banned on that game really doesn’t make sense how the other people involved didn’t get banned to but at the end of the day karma will get to them. 1 Star
